title: Repeated Copies to Parquet get Slower on Windows
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Float64, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5), (2, 'test2', NULL), (3, 'test3', 20.0);
CREATE TABLE another_table AS SELECT id, name, value * 2 AS doubled_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 5 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT a.id, a.name, b.doubled_value FROM test_table a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.value > 15;
key_bug_features: Repeated copies to parquet get slower on Windows
